creator: syrinx@FreeBSD.org
text:
Commited. Thanks for reporting and testing the patch!

On Tue, Dec 29, 2009 at 10:52 PM, Sergey Chernikov <s.bilberry@gmail.com> wrote:
> After more than 1 day uptime in the same conditions, but with the patch
> applied, I can say that it fixes the problem.
> Please commit to 8.0-STABLE.
>
